title: galarhoeus corollatus
intro: Galarhoeus corollatus, also known as the Chinese milkwort or Tian Hua Fen, is a type of perennial plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Galarhoeus corollatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough and sore throat, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Galarhoeus corollatus include decoctions, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to treat various health conditions.
